MANCHESTER 24th April 2018: Gama, global provider business information services specializing FMCG product innovation international trade, today officially opened entries upcoming edition Gama Innovation Awards.
Gama Innovation Awards recognise outstanding innovation FMCG space across eight categories: Product, Packaging, Positioning, Branding Design, Health Wellness, SME, Best Britain Best Middle East.
Winners will announced awards ceremony that will take place Manchester's iconic Bridgewater Hall Thursday 25th October 2018.
Gama today also reveal panel international judges will tasked with choosing winning entries from shortlist innovative products each category.
Representing some leading FMCG firms across globe, exciting line-up judges includes thought leaders from companies such Kraft Heinz, Unilever, Carlsberg, Sonae PepsiCo, underlining Gama Innovation Awards' growing reputation major showcase global innovation.
Cesar Pereira, founder Gama, commented: thrilled return this year with expanded edition Gama Innovation Awards.
expect event inspiring opportunity celebrate very best global FMCG innovation.
2018 also delighted introduce Best Middle East award, recognising increased dynamism FMCG sector region".
Gama Innovation Award will represent fantastic accolade every winner, judging panel made their industry peers, including executives from world's leading FMCG businesses".
Entries Gama Innovation Awards open until Friday 15th June, manufacturers invited submit their product innovations consideration accordance with entry requirements qualifying criteria.
Gama global provider business information services specializing product innovation international trade.
Through worldwide network over experts more than countries, Gama offers high-quality news, research, analysis partnering services.

growth likely rebounded October, with wages expected have recorded their largest annual gain 9-1/2 years, pointing further labour market tightening that could encourage Federal Reserve raise interest rates again December.
Labour Department's closely watched monthly employment report Friday also expected show unemployment rate steady 49-year cent.
Sustained labour market strength could ease fears about economy's health following weak housing data stalling business spending, reports Reuters.
Payrolls rose 134,000 jobs September, smallest gain year, after Hurricane Florence drenched North South Carolina, weighing restaurant retail employment.
anticipated bounce back growth likely tempered some what Hurricane Michael, which struck Florida Panhandle mid-October.
"The employment report should help calm some concerns that economy slowing more quickly than really economy really good shape," said Ryan Sweet, senior economist Moody's Analytics Westchester, Pennsylvania.
Average hourly earnings forecast rising cent October after advancing cent September.
This would boost annual increase wages cent, biggest gain since April 2009, from cent September.
Strong annual wage growth would mirror other data published this week showing wages salaries rising third quarter most since mid-2008.
Hourly compensation also increased brisk pace third quarter.
Firming wages support views that inflation will hover around Fed's cent target while.
personal consumption expenditures price index excluding volatile food energy components increased cent five straight months.
expected raise rates meeting next Wednesday, economists believe strong labour market data could central bank signal increase December.
raised borrowing costs September third time this year.

It's continuation trend they have seen over last several years.
"It's been almost three years nothing above normal temperatures most part," Zierden told Bradenton Herald phone inteview Monday.
noted that last consecutive months have been warmer than what considered normal.
Tampa weather stations showing record warm ranking, according second tweet from Zierden.
According Florida Climate Center, average temperature Tampa during November 72.1 degrees, three degrees warmer than normal.
Most state exhibited similar, trend.
"All that consistent with what other parts world have seen what expect with climate change, would certainly think climate change fingerprints recent trend above-normal temperatures," Zierden said.
Manatee County, there were nine high temperatures through November, according NCEI daily weather records.
days through November tied record- high temperatures.
However, Zierden cautioned, just because average temperatures have been warmer doesn't mean Florida won't cold snaps this winter.
Across country, it's been above-average year temperatures, report from National Centers Environmental Information shows.
year-to-date U.S. average temperature, 56.4 degrees, third warmest record.
That's 2.61 degrees above 20th century average, according NCEI.
warmest year record U.S. 2012, when average temperature through November 57.04 degrees, NCEI archives show.
Spectrum News Meteorologist Josh Linker said average temperatures will likely remain above average least through Christmas, just couple degrees each day.
Temperatures, however, return average last days year.
Linker said December currently averaging less than degree above normal, part recent week cooler weather.

Last night feeling down confused with things that happening life want them happen.
couple Youtube video's about Motivated, Think Clearly etc.
etc.
nothing changed.
wanted gulp down shots ignore what's been troubling then realized that much more stronger than what going through life right now.
healers, keep saying that 'It's mind, your mind creates your reality etc."
what realized that wasn't really following what others.
small moment guilt shame came over then blessing which have level awareness, able quickly analyze those moments, mind tried create even negative situation simply because rule life.
Cmon, want make difference whole world difference will have begin from Changing thinking thoughts about myself.
sure through these dark phases lives feel like
BUT, BUT, hang these called Dark phases your life Introspect little, will know deeper meaning they came First place?
have Change World, have First Change World"
somehow Intuitively guided Write these questions white board then When read them later, felt that these Answers Help move past dark phase into Light.
After all, Light means Guidance, Wisdom, Illumination.
working Vision Goals Life?
taking necessary actions convert Vision into Reality?
What contribution today Life's Purpose?
making impact improve world?
living just self feel improve world give contribution make better place generations come?
What Today really help empower others with current abilities knowledge?
less than Improve perfect 10/10?
what better ways Help Assistance others?
These questions pulled from going into negative thoughts some very inspiring answers began coming from heart, mind heart working sync improvise vision empowering take ACTION.
leave feedback these questions helped out.
looking forward hear results your kind comments.
